title: good: schnorr.rs defense-in-depth signature verification
description: In schnorr.rs:verify() (lines 82-122), verification rejects identity points, low-order/torsion points, non-canonical scalars, and zero scalars. These checks prevent attacks on cofactor-sensitive operations. The code is well-documented with inline comments explaining each check's purpose. Worth defending if someone suggests 'simplifying' by removing checks.
